ddls:
CREATE TABLE "leagues" (
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each league */,
  "league_name" TEXT /* Name of the league (e.g., English Premier League) */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season the league belongs to (e.g., 2022-23) */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the league is held */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the season */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the season */,
  "number_of_teams" INTEGER /* Total number of teams in the league */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team (e.g., Arsenal, Man City) */,
  "league_id" INTEGER /* ID of the league the team belongs to */,
  "position" INTEGER /* Current position of the team in the league */,
  "matches_played" INTEGER /* Number of matches played by the team */,
  "goal_difference" INTEGER /* Goal difference of the team */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Number of points earned by the team */,
  "founded" TEXT /* Year the team was founded */,
  "stadium" TEXT /* Name of the team's home stadium */,
  "manager" TEXT /* Current manager of the team */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Stadium capacity */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the team's data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_league_id FOREIGN KEY ("league_id") REFERENCES leagues ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "matches" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match */,
  "home_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the home team */,
  "away_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the away team */,
  "league_id" INTEGER /* ID of the league */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season the match belongs to */,
  "match_date" TEXT /* Date of the match */,
  "home_team_score" INTEGER /* Score of the home team */,
  "away_team_score" INTEGER /* Score of the away team */,
  "referee" TEXT /* Name of the referee */,
  "stadium" TEXT /* Name of the stadium where the match was played */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of spectators */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the match (e.g., completed, postponed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_league_id FOREIGN KEY ("league_id") REFERENCES leagues ("league_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_home_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("home_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_away_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("away_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player belongs to */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player (e.g., forward, midfielder) */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Player's nationality */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Player's date of birth */,
  "height" INTEGER /* Player's height in centimeters */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Player's weight in kilograms */,
  "foot" TEXT /* Preferred foot (e.g., left, right) */,
  "joined" TEXT /* Date the player joined the team */,
  "contract_expires" TEXT /* Date the player's contract expires */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player statistic record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match */,
  "goals" INTEGER /* Number of goals scored */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Number of assists */,
  "yellow_cards" INTEGER /* Number of yellow cards received */,
  "red_cards" INTEGER /* Number of red cards received */,
  "minutes_played" INTEGER /* Number of minutes played in the match */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_statistics_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_statistics_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id")
)
column_names: Name of the league (e.g., English Premier League)

Status of the match (e.g., completed, postponed)
ID of the team the player belongs to
Position of the player (e.g., forward, midfielder)
Date the player joined the team
